author: qndel
orig: taki rasizm jakby ci ziomek wbił do chaty i darł mordę po jakiemuś, a ty każesz po polsku wypierdalać xD
en: such racism as if your friend broke into your house and punched someone in the face and you told him to fuck off in Polish xD
pt: tanto racismo como se seu amigo invadisse sua casa e desse um soco na cara de alguém e você mandasse ele se foder em polonês xD
label: xenophobic

context.author: pentagram
context.orig: Ja tu wchodzi małpa to czuje się mega niekomfortowo, czy w takim razie powinni wyrzucic małpy z DC? Czuje się atakowany
context.en: When a monkey comes in here, he feels very uncomfortable, so should they throw the monkeys out of DC? He feels attacked
context.pt: Quando um macaco chega aqui, ele se sente muito desconfortável, então eles deveriam expulsar os macacos de DC? Ele se sente atacado
context.label: racist
